rulings.Case Title: T&C PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Respondent T And C Properties Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Post Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 18, 2023 line 1. PETITIONER T&C PROPERTIES, LLC Petitioner Respondent T And C Properties Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Post Arbitration is CONTINUED to May 24, 2023 per the stipulation of the parties. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Superior Court To Deposit Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 18, 2023 line 2. PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP Notice Of Petition To Superior Court To Deposit Surplus Funds is CONTINUED to June 15, 2023. Petitioner to provide the Court with supplemental briefing to clarify: (1) which two claimants are in dispute; (2) what the dispute is; and (3) the status of the remaining claimants, including whether their claims have been resolved.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Third Party Shuzhen Tu'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing Distribution Of Receivership Funds (Motions)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 18, 2023 line 3. THIRD PARTY SHUZHEN TU Third Party Shuzhen Tu'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing Distribution Of Receivership Funds (Motions) Hearing Required, for the Court to determine whether an order of abatement is required. The parties and counsel are ordered to appear in person at 9:30 a.m., in Department 501. Request for Judicial Notice is granted as to the December 2, 2019, Receivers First and Final Report and Inventory; but denied as to the 2007 Deed of Trust, and the 2019 Trustees Deed upon Sale. No accompanying declaration attesting to the veracity of the documents. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
